description: Identify patients in the 'DrTuxTest' database who underwent cataract surgery ('Opération de la cataracte' or 'Chirurgie cataracte') in 2024 but did not have a follow-up consultation within the mandatory 1-7 day post-operative window (inclusive). Generate a CSV report at /home/ga/Documents/audit_cataracte_2024.csv listing these non-compliant patients with the headers: GUID, Nom, Prenom, Date_Chirurgie, Statut (set to 'NON_CONFORME').
